description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. Use four jobs for different platforms: build-linux on ubuntu-latest, build-windows on windows-latest, build-emscripten on ubuntu-20.04, and build-macos on macos-latest. For each job, check out the repository with submodules, then perform platform-specific steps to install dependencies, build, and test.
